382 GG0170SS3_TYPE_OF_WLCHR150_END GG0170SS3_TYPE_OF_WLCHR150_END GG0170SS3 Indicate type of wheelchair or scooter (Dschg) - The data in this column indicate the type of wheelchair or scooter used by the patient used in wheeling 150 feet at the time of discharge. CHAR 1 The data in this column indicate the type of wheelchair or scooter
